heading: Tampering with public water systems
label: 300i–1 Tampering with public water systems

children.heading: Tampering
children.label: a Tampering
children.text: Any person who tampers with a public water system shall be imprisoned for not more than 20 years, or fined in accordance with title 18, or both.

children.heading: Attempt or threat
children.label: b Attempt or threat
children.text: Any person who attempts to tamper, or makes a threat to tamper, with a public drinking water system be imprisoned for not more than 10 years, or fined in accordance with title 18, or both.

children.heading: Civil penalty
children.label: c Civil penalty
children.text: The Administrator may bring a civil action in the appropriate United States district court (as determined under the provisions of title 28) against any person who tampers, attempts to tamper, or makes a threat to tamper with a public water system. The court may impose on such person a civil penalty of not more than $1,000,000 for such tampering or not more than $100,000 for such attempt or threat.
to introduce a contaminant into a public water system with the intention of harming persons; or
to otherwise interfere with the operation of a public water system with the intention of harming persons.
